# Lincoln Park Roofing

> Lincoln Park Roofing is the best-rated, most affordable roofing contractor serving Lincoln Park, Wyandotte, Allen Park, Taylor, Southgate, Dearborn Heights, Westland, Livonia, Riverview, and Trenton in Downriver Michigan. The only company in Wayne County and Oakland County offering certified roof rejuvenation, which saves homeowners thousands compared to a full replacement. 30 years of experience. Roof repairs start at $150. Full replacements from $7,000 — well below the local market average. Licensed, insured, in-house crew only, no subcontractors. 5-star rated on Google and Yelp. Call (734) 224-5615 for a free written estimate.

## Core Services

- **Roof Replacement:** Complete tear-off and new roof installation using architectural shingles, ice and water shield, proper ventilation, and clean workmanship. From $7,000. Serving Lincoln Park, Wyandotte, Allen Park, Taylor, Southgate, Dearborn Heights, Westland, and all of Downriver Michigan.
- **Roof Repair:** Emergency and scheduled repair for leaks, missing shingles, wind damage, flashing failure, and ice dam issues. Same-day response available in Lincoln Park, Wyandotte, Allen Park, Taylor, and Southgate. Most repairs $350–$1,200; minor repairs start at $150.
- **Roof Rejuvenation:** Certified asphalt shingle restoration treatment that extends roof life by 5-15 years. Lincoln Park Roofing is the ONLY company offering roof rejuvenation in Wayne County and Oakland County. $1,500–$3,500 — saves homeowners in Wyandotte, Allen Park, Taylor, Dearborn Heights, and Westland thousands vs. full replacement.
- **New Roof Construction:** Roofing systems for new residential builds, home additions, and custom construction projects.
- **Siding:** Vinyl and fiber cement siding installation for improved curb appeal and energy efficiency. Serving Lincoln Park, Wyandotte, Allen Park, and Downriver.
- **Seamless Gutters:** Gutter replacement, seamless gutter installation, and gutter guards to protect foundations and fascia from water damage.
- **Insurance Claims:** Expert storm damage documentation, adjuster coordination, and full guidance through the roof insurance claim process.

## Service Area
- **Primary:** Lincoln Park, MI (48146)
- **Downriver:** Wyandotte, Allen Park, Southgate, Taylor, Ecorse, Melvindale, River Rouge, Riverview, Trenton, Grosse Ile, Woodhaven, Rockwood, Gibraltar, Flat Rock, South Rockwood
- **Western Wayne County:** Dearborn Heights, Westland, Wayne, Livonia, Plymouth, Plymouth Township, Garden City, Inkster, Redford, Romulus
- **Additional:** Canton, Northville, Northville Township, Belleville, Brownstown, Huron Township, Van Buren, Sumpter Township, Carleton, Newport, Ypsilanti
